title: Hitorigoto Lab — every order, made for you by AI
description: The Hitorigoto Lab storefront. There's no stock — the moment you order, AI builds a one-off from your input and delivers it to you.
ogDescription: Every order, made for you by AI.
headline:
You bring the intent.
AI makes it, just for you.
lead: "Where do I even start?" — we take that small, easily-lost thought seriously. There's no stock here. The moment you order, AI builds a one-off from your input and sends it straight to your inbox.
how: Answer a few questions at checkout
AI designs a one-off from your answers alone
Delivered by email within 24 hours (usually minutes)

about.title: About the lab
about.heading: Why everything is "made for you"
about.body:
Hitorigoto Lab starts from the quiet thought most people never say out loud — "where do I even start?" — and designs a one-off deliverable addressed to you, one at a time. Nothing sits on a shelf. The moment your order arrives, we begin building something made only for you, from the goal, the starting point, and the constraints you gave us — and nothing else.

Off-the-shelf answers aren't addressed to you. So we begin by restating what you told us — "here's what we understood" — before we build anything: so we never work from a wrong premise, and never water your message down into generic advice. No cheerleading, no rankings, no diagnoses. Just an answer addressed to you, right now.

An AI does the making, but the design stance is constant — receive, address, commit. The Deck Studio, the Roadmap Studio, and every studio we add next are built on the same posture. That's the Hitorigoto Lab storefront.
